_publications._publicationTitle: A cerebellopontine angle mouse model for the investigation of tumor biology, hearing, and neurological function in NF2-related vestibular schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: Tumors are expected to grow and mice are expected to become moribund in 3–5 weeks
details: Tumors are expected to grow and mice become moribund in 3-5 weeks following implantation
